caption: The video features an interview at MongoDB World 2022, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. The speaker, Sanjeev Mohan, identified as the Principal of SanjMo, is seen speaking into a microphone, likely discussing topics related to MongoDB or technology. He is dressed in a formal black suit and white shirt, indicating the professional nature of the event. In the background, several people are engaged in conversations, suggesting a networking or conference setting. The video is sponsored by MongoDB, as indicated by the logo and text overlay, and is part of "theCUBE" coverage, which specializes in tech-related content. The overall atmosphere appears to be lively and interactive, with attendees actively participating in discussions.
